prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年青海大学在山西省理科/物理类最低位次分别为约 21915→28440→26277→31639→37878，整体呈持续后移趋势，2021 至 2025 年累计后移约 15963 名；其中 2024→2025 年单年后移约 6239 名，后移幅度明显加大，2025 年基准位次约 37878 名；该校在山西省理科/物理类招生计划 2021–2023 年均为 35 人，2024–2025 年增至 37 人；2026 年物理类计划 30 人、医学组计划 7 人，合计 37 人，与 2025 年持平，计划总量未发生变化，对竞争格局无直接冲击。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 青海大学为 211 工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名 2021 年第 180 名、2022 年第 182 名、2024 年第 173 名、2025 年第 198 名，2026 年未进入前 200 名，整体排名处于全国中后段，对高分考生吸引力有限；该校在 2021–2026 年声誉舆情文件中均无记录，未见明显正面或负面舆情事件；投档异常记录中亦无该校信息，声誉层面未产生额外报考心理扰动；青海大学 在第五轮学科评估数据中无 A- 及以上等级学科，学科竞争力相对薄弱，对考生吸引力主要依赖 211 身份而非学科优势。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026 年专业热度分析显示，计算机类、电气工程及其自动化、临床医学等偏热专业持续受追捧，而土木建筑、生化环材等仍处劝退区间；该校招生专业以工科和农林类为主，热门专业 占比有限；山西省 2026 年物理类考生约 167419 人，较 2025 年 173347 人减少约 5928 人（-3.4%），考生总数下降使竞争有所缓和；2026 年；青海大学位于青海省西宁市，距山西省较远，跨省就读的地域偏好对山西考生吸引力一般；该校在山西省招生计划占比较小， 未构成显著地域偏好影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026 年招生计划与 2025 年持平、山西省物理类考生减少约 3.4% 使竞争略有缓和、学校层次与学科竞争力一般、声誉无显著扰动等因素，在 2025 年基准位次 37878 名基础上预计位次小幅前移（更易进）；预测最低位次约 37678 名，区间 37178–38178 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings of Qinghai University in Shanxi Province for Science/Physics Category were approximately 21915 → 28440 → 26277 → 31639 → 37878, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 15963 positions from 2021 to 2025; among them, the single-year backward shift from 2024 to 2025 was about 6239 positions, with a significantly increased magnitude; the baseline ranking in 2025 is about 37878; the enrollment plan for Science/Physics Category in Shanxi Province was 35 students from 2021 to 2023, and increased to 37 students from 2024 to 2025; in 2026, the Physics Category plan is 30 students and the Medical Group plan is 7 students, totaling 37 students, unchanged from 2025, with no direct impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Qinghai University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science Chinese University Rankings were 180th in 2021, 182nd in 2022, 173rd in 2024, and 198th in 2025. In 2026, it did not enter the top 200, with overall rankings in the middle to lower segment of the country, having limited appeal to high-scoring students; the university has no records in reputation and public opinion files from 2021 to 2026, with no significant positive or negative public opinion events; there is also no information about the university in abnormal filing records, so no additional psychological disturbance in application behavior from the reputation level; Qinghai University has no A- or above level disciplines in the fifth round of discipline evaluation data, with relatively weak disciplinary competitiveness, and its appeal to students mainly relies on its 211 status rather than disciplinary advantages.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The 2026 major popularity analysis shows that popular majors such as Computer Science and Technology, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Clinical Medicine continue to be sought after, while majors like Civil Engineering, Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials are still in the discouraged range; the university's enrollment majors are mainly engineering and agriculture/forestry, with a limited proportion of popular majors; in 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Shanxi Province is about 167,419, a decrease of about 5,928 ( -3.4%) from 173,347 in 2025, making competition somewhat eased; Qinghai University is located in Xining City, Qinghai Province, far from Shanxi Province, and the regional preference for cross-province study has average appeal to Shanxi students; the university's enrollment plan in Shanxi Province accounts for a small proportion, not constituting a significant regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged from 2025, the 3.4% decrease in Shanxi Province Physics Category examinees slightly easing competition, the average school level and disciplinary competitiveness, and no significant reputation disturbances, based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 37878, the ranking is expected to slightly move forward (easier to enter); the predicted minimum ranking is about 37678, with a range of 37178–38178.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 37178–38178, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 37000), you can focus on sprinting for popular majors such as Computer Science and Technology (Green Computing Innovation Class) and Electrical Engineering and Automation; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (outside 38000), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission, while also paying attention to Tier 2 majors with relatively lower ranking requirements.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 青海大学医学类在山西省近五年最低录取位次呈持续下滑趋势：2021年21915名→2022年26567名→2023年27417名→2024年30724名→2025年49507名，位次数字逐年增大，说明医学类 整体录取难度在降低。招生计划方面，2021-2022年均为6人，2023-2024年增至7人，2025年扩至8人，而2026年计划缩减至7人（缩招1人，降幅12.5%）。缩招通常会使位次数字减 小（竞争加剧），但近年位次大幅下滑的趋势对位次有向下拉动作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 青海大学是211工程重点建设高校，同时入选国家双一流建设高校，位于青海省西宁市。作为青海省唯一的211高校，其在西北地区具有较高的认可度，医学类专业是学校的传统 优势方向之一，但相比东部及中部地区同类院校，对山西考生的吸引力相对有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业在全国范围内持续保持较高报考热度，临床医学、口腔医学等核心专业竞争尤为激烈。青海大学地处西北，地理位置对山西考生而言距离较远，一定程度上影响了报 考意愿。2026年山西省医学类招生规模缩减，整体竞争格局略有收紧，但青海大学医学类在山西的招生体量较小（7人），个别专业的位次波动容易对整体最低位次产生较大影响 。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合M3供需弹性模型计算结果及近年位次趋势，2026年青海大学医学类在山西省最低录取位次预计为45494名，较2025年有所回升（位次数字减小，竞争略加剧），主要受招生计 划缩减影响。预计位次区间为45094-45894名，考生在此区间内报考有较大录取把握。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Qinghai University's medical programs in Shanxi Province have shown a continuous downward trend over the past five years: 21,915 in 2021 → 26,567 in 2022 → 27,417 in 2023 → 30,724 in 2024 → 49,507 in 2025, with the ranking numbers increasing year by year, indicating that the overall admission difficulty for medical programs is decreasing. In terms of enrollment plan, it was 6 students in both 2021 and 2022, increased to 7 students in 2023 and 2024, expanded to 8 students in 2025, and is planned to be reduced to 7 students in 2026 (a reduction of 1 student, a decrease of 12.5%). A reduction in enrollment usually causes the ranking number to decrease (increased competition), but the recent trend of a significant decline in rankings has a downward pulling effect on the rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Qinghai University is a key construction university under the 211 Project and is also selected as a national Double First-Class construction university, located in Xining City, Qinghai Province. As the only 211 university in Qinghai Province, it has a high degree of recognition in the northwest region. Medical programs are one of the traditional advantageous directions of the school, but compared to similar institutions in the eastern and central regions, its appeal to Shanxi candidates is relatively limited.

专业热度与地域.title: Program Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Medical programs nationwide continue to maintain a high level of application popularity, with core programs such as clinical medicine and stomatology being particularly competitive. Qinghai University is located in the northwest, and its geographical location is relatively distant for Shanxi candidates, which to some extent affects their willingness to apply. In 2026, the enrollment scale for medical programs in Shanxi Province will be reduced, slightly tightening the overall competition landscape. However, the enrollment volume of Qinghai University's medical programs in Shanxi is small (7 students), and fluctuations in individual program rankings can have a significant impact on the overall minimum ranking.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the calculation results of the M3 supply-demand elasticity model and recent ranking trends, the minimum admission ranking for Qinghai University's medical programs in Shanxi Province in 2026 is expected to be 45,494, an increase compared to 2025 (ranking number decreases, competition slightly intensifies), mainly affected by the reduction in enrollment plan. The expected ranking range is 45,094 to 45,894, and candidates within this range have a high probability of admission.
